suggestions.title: No meta description or Open Graph tags
suggestions.description: The page lacks <meta name="description"> and Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image). This hurts SEO rankings and means link previews on Slack, Twitter, etc. show no useful info when shared.

suggestions.title: No React error boundary
suggestions.description: There is no ErrorBoundary component wrapping the app or key subtrees. Any unhandled render error will cause a completely blank page for the user with no recovery path. Add an ErrorBoundary with a fallback UI.

suggestions.title: Animations ignore prefers-reduced-motion
suggestions.description: CSS animations and transitions do not check the prefers-reduced-motion media query. Users who have enabled reduced motion in their OS settings (often due to vestibular disorders or epilepsy) still see full animations, which can cause discomfort or harm.

suggestions.title: No branded favicon
suggestions.description: The app uses the default Vite favicon. A custom favicon matching the app's brand/theme would improve polish and help users identify the tab among many open tabs.

suggestions.title: Activity log has no filtering or search
suggestions.description: The activity log displays all events in a flat list with no way to filter by worker, event type, or date range, and no search input. As the log grows this becomes unusable. Add at minimum a text search and event-type filter.

suggestions.title: No loading state when switching tabs
suggestions.description: Switching between tabs triggers data fetches or re-renders with no visual feedback. Users with slower connections see a blank or stale panel with no indication that content is loading. Add a skeleton or spinner during tab transitions.

suggestions.title: Coffee corner is purely decorative
suggestions.description: The coffee corner UI element is a static decoration. It could be made functional by letting workers toggle a 'on break' status that shows in the coffee corner, giving the feature real utility and reinforcing the fun theme.

suggestions.title: No keyboard shortcuts to switch tabs
suggestions.description: Power users cannot navigate between tabs without reaching for the mouse. Adding keyboard shortcuts (e.g., Ctrl+1/2/3 or Alt+arrow keys) would significantly improve efficiency for frequent users.

suggestions.title: Worker cards do not show hire date
suggestions.description: Worker cards display status and role but omit the hire date. This is often useful context for managers (e.g., identifying new vs. tenured workers). Add hire date as a secondary detail on each card.

suggestions.title: No notification or sound when worker status changes
suggestions.description: Status changes happen silently. Users who leave the app in a background tab miss updates entirely. Adding a browser notification (with permission) and/or a subtle sound cue would keep supervisors informed without requiring constant manual refreshing.
